name: S-4 --check-freshness flags sources whose last-fetch marker exceeds the catalog fetch_frequency window
command:
printf -- '- id: g
  fetch_frequency: daily
' > cat.yaml && mkdir -p tree/g .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - {id: r, provenance: [{source: g}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && printf '2026-05-20T00:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/g.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-audit.sh" --emit r.md --catalog cat.yaml --tree tree --check-freshness --now 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z && grep -q '### Stale sources' r.md && grep -q 'g: stale' r.md && echo stale 1>&2
